final_prompt.prompt:
Create an interior design illustration of an industrial-style cafe (any in-image text in Chinese, if rendered).

Style/medium: needs an "industrial style" aesthetic — references in the spirit of 1990s New York loft conversion photography, Kinfolk magazine raw-material editorial style, Tokyo 倉庫系 cafe interior design movement; exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: framing is yours
Subject: must include exposed concrete walls, metal piping, vintage leather sofa, large windows with natural light, black-and-white photography on walls
Scene/backdrop: must include a cafe interior context
Lighting/mood: needs a rugged yet refined atmosphere — exact light source mix is yours
Color palette: 
Materials/textures: must include rough concrete, aged metal, worn leather, matte photographic prints
Text (verbatim): 
Constraints: if any in-image text is rendered, default to Chinese
Avoid:
